source_priority_definitions.P0: daily-refresh distress sources (clerk, court, sheriff, code, tax delinquency) — at least one P0 must be unblocked for a shippable build
source_priority_definitions.P1: weekly-refresh distress sources (sheriff weekly PDFs, bulk extracts) — supplement only, cannot be sole distress feed
source_priority_definitions.P2: enrichment sources (parcel master, GIS, USPS, utility) — supporting context, never the headline

build_priority_definitions.mvp_required: build first to ship minimum viable lead pipeline
build_priority_definitions.high_value: high-value lead source, build after MVP
build_priority_definitions.enrichment: supporting enrichment, no leads on its own

source_reliability_grade_definitions.A: official source of truth (clerk recorder, tax collector, court of jurisdiction direct)
source_reliability_grade_definitions.B: official but delayed (same official source delivered via public-records request or scheduled bulk)
source_reliability_grade_definitions.D: scraped public display only, not authoritative

do_not_argue: These rules are locked. Future Claude sessions should not re-debate them.
Changing any locked rule requires the operator to explicitly unlock it and update this file.
Do not silently rename folders, move files, replace approved rules, or add county-specific examples.
If a proposed change conflicts with locked rules, stop and ask before patching.
